reviews.review_description:
At first it was just shooting different kinds of ducks, and I mean that was fun by itself but…
SPOILER AHEAD!






There are these red ducks that throw eggs and destroy walls. It gets good.

At lvl 25+- there a so many bird that game is too lagy to shoot something. That why high score is 11000+-.  Dev need to optimize birds. Do something with types becouse only red is dangerous. And add more guns/settings, fly patterns. And reload to guns, that will be so much harder with reloads. Good luck

It’s very fun, highly addictive trying to beat your score, but it can get very glitchy. On level 26 the whole thing glitches out before you can really do any damage. If it’s fixed, the game will be awesome. ￼So I’m giving it 3 stars, for now. But please fix it!! 🙂
So much fun and nostalgia here, seriously satisfying feedback and hilarious sound effects coming from 360. Thanks!

My score is based on pure gameplay of this game. Since the game is free, I think it's worth checking out since there is no risk. I found the shooting in this game to be pretty hard (which maybe some will find fun). I just could never really tell where my bullet went, so it was hard to know if I was aiming too high or two low. For me, it seemed like I always needed to aim a bit lower than where the bird was for it to hit. I feel like this game could be great with some improvements. Regardless, still an enjoyable enough game to spend a few minutes in here and there.
This game is fun to play and free. There is no add-on content. No adverts that I'm aware of? How do they pay for their development and staffing costs?

reviews.review_title: Please fix bugs and please add multiplay
reviews.review_description: The bugs are kinda out of hand I could not close the door so i died and if multi player was added I would give it 5 stars
So the shotgun you can’t get now but you could in the og version I played it Og not on my quest but on my uncles that helped make this game so overall great game so 100/10
This game is great but could maybe update the graphics 🤷‍♂️
In the trailer it shows a shotgun u can get but there us none to use. Idk if I just can't find it but till I do or someone tells me then its a 3 star game

I loved the shooting mechanism.
I looked for like three weeks for a good shooter game and then came across this one, and I LOVED it. I could play this game for like five hours at a time. I loved the original duck hunt so this was just amazing. Thank you app lab and BoomBamBingo for creating this game!!!!!
Easy to play and simple to pickup and do well in. Learning basic shooting that applies to other games on the Oculus marketplace. Nothing fancy, just good shooting fun!

developer_response.body:
Hi UHATEIT, thanks so much for the feedback! 

We've just released a big update to our environment, and would love to hear what you think! Feel free to share anything else you think would make the game even more fun.

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love the game and my score is getting better everytime I play.  What happen to the leaderboard?  I was number 3 on the board, but now I'm not sure.  The board is there, there is just no information on it.  Thanks
I love to shoot ducks and it is basic🦆🦆🦆
